summary: Settings/Profile Redesign Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed for regular user and admin user flows.

critical.issue: Function creates user_doc and wallet_doc but never inserts them into database. The insert code and return statement are unreachable (placed after delete-account function at lines 312-316). New users cannot complete Google OAuth registration.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /app/backend/routes/auth.py - The google_complete function (lines 229-290) is missing the code to insert user and wallet documents. The db.users.insert_one, db.wallets.insert_one, and return statement are currently placed after the delete-account function (lines 312-316) making them unreachable dead code. Move lines 312-316 to be inside the google_complete function before line 291.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py has code after return statement at line 316 (dead code after google_complete function) - this should be cleaned up
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - using existing seeded data (5 app_content items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings/Profile redesign fully tested. Key findings: 1) Profile page has redesigned header with account icon (left), name + 'Info account' link, profile photo button (right), and settings gear icon. 2) Settings page (/settings) has all 5 menu items: Dati Personali, Le mie Gift Card, Trattamento dati, Privacy Policy, Rimuovi account, plus Log Out button. 3) Dati Personali (/settings/personal) shows name, email (disabled), phone, address fields with save button working. 4) Trattamento Dati (/settings/data-treatment) shows 4 sections with toggle switches, badge shows 'Attivo' or 'Non attivo'. 5) Privacy Policy (/settings/privacy) loads content from /api/content/privacy_policy. 6) Gift Cards (/settings/gift-cards) shows empty state or purchased cards from /api/giftcards/my-purchases. 7) Rimuovi Account (/settings/delete-account) has two-step confirmation flow. 8) Admin Content (/admin/content) shows all 5 content items with edit buttons, edit form has title/content inputs and save button. 9) Admin button 'Admin - Contenuti' visible on dashboard for admin user (admin@test.com). 10) Account deletion via POST /api/auth/delete-account sets is_deleted=true, login cancels deletion.

verified_features.Profile page header redesign: PASS - Account icon left, name shown, Info account link, profile photo right, settings gear icon
verified_features.Settings page menu items: PASS - All 5 items (personal, gift-cards, data-treatment, privacy, delete-account) + logout button visible
verified_features.Settings navigation: PASS - Each item navigates to correct sub-page
verified_features.Dati Personali page: PASS - Name, email (disabled), phone, address fields; save works
verified_features.Trattamento Dati page: PASS - 4 sections with switches, badge status changes
verified_features.Le mie Gift Card page: PASS - Shows empty state or purchased cards
verified_features.Admin Content page: PASS - Admin can view and edit all 5 content items
verified_features.Backend POST /api/auth/delete-account: PASS - Soft deletes with 30-day grace period
verified_features.Backend GET /api/admin/content: PASS - Admin gets all content (regular user denied)
verified_features.Admin button on dashboard: PASS - 'Admin - Contenuti' visible for admin user

code_issue_found: CRITICAL BUG: In /app/backend/routes/auth.py lines 312-316, there is dead code after the return statement in the delete-account endpoint. This appears to be leftover code from the google_complete function that should have been inside that function (lines 229-290). The db.users.insert_one, db.wallets.insert_one and return statement are unreachable. This means Google Auth complete flow is broken - new users cannot be registered via Google OAuth because the code to create the user and wallet is placed in the wrong function.
